cons: I haven't seen any cons till now, Kenyt.AI is the best chatbot that I have ever come across

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like the easy to use features of kenyt ai products the dashboard is also very informative and helps me in analyzing data very quickly.Their customer support team is helpful and very generous.
cons: The product sometimes faces glitches and bugs but the team fix them very soon so according to me that's the only scope of improvement.

description: All in all Kenyt.AI's chatbot solutions and customer support is exceptional.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The chat bots are highly sophisticated which would transform the customer experience.One of the standout feature of Kenyt.AI is its fully automated customer support, that is even the customer support is provided through the bots at anytime. In terms of UI/UX it is very easy to use the chat bots, with just click we can interact with the bot. I also like the seamless integration of the bots with WhatsApp and other social media.In a developer perspective it is very easy to train a bot and deploy the bot in just few clicks without mush effort. Even the developer or admin can customize the chat bot interface.
cons: Kenyt.AI's dashboard is highly sophisticated with all the settings and customizations available, but it can be little tricky of new user from a non technical background to use the dashboard and deploy chat bots.

review_title: Kenyt: The Chatbot that Makes Human Connection Scalable
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Effectiveness, Ease of Use, Sophisticated Technology, Detailed Reporting.
cons: Limited Customization, Complex Dashboard, Potential for Bias and Design Needs Improvement.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Chatbot is very easy to use and the dashboard is also good. It shows relevant data at a glance and helps us manage a large set of customers easily. The customer support is also good, they are Swift in handling customer queries.
cons: Sometimes the product has glitches, however the customer support team offers quick support at those times. The overall customisation in terms of looks and feel should also be there.

author: Varun K.
pros: The Kenyt team is extremely responsive and proactive with their communication and support. The product itself works very well, and setting it up was seamless.
cons: Initial less quality was wanting. But having said that the team is working hard to rectify it as we move forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nitesh T.
pros: we worked with Kenyt for our company's automation needs, and I couldn't be more impressed. Their bots significantly streamlined our operations, enhancing efficiency and productivity. Kenyt's team demonstrated exceptional professionalism and technical expertise, delivering user-friendly solutions perfectly tailored to our needs. Their customer support was outstanding, always responsive and helpful. Overall, Kenyt exceeded our expectations and transformed our workflow. Highly recommended!
cons: If it can be integrated with our HIS system for complete automation
